name: Homeownership Status
description: Homeownership status of 10,000 Lending Club loan applicants (IMS Ch. 3)
studyDescription: Data from 10,000 loans made through the Lending Club platform. Each loan applicant reported their homeownership status as one of three categories: mortgage (currently paying a mortgage), rent (renting), or own (owns their home outright).

variableDescriptions.homeownership: Whether the loan applicant is currently paying a mortgage, renting, or owns their home outright.

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS, Section 3.1. Data from Lending Club (openintro::loans_full_schema), subset to homeownership variable only.
